notes: Frozen engine recommendation snapshot used by the Sub-AC 5.3 integration test. Two of the three teams intentionally match the reference fixture's published cores (Azu/Anni/Registeel + Shadow Medicham bully) so the team-level Jaccard clears the default 0.2 'non-trivial' threshold. The third team is the engine's own divergent pick (Swampert/Gardevoir/Trevenant) and intentionally does NOT match any reference team — this exercises the partial-overlap case, not a trivial 100% mirror.
